description_long: This bungalow features a prominent gable roof with dark gray shingles and a wide overhang, supported by sturdy white columns. The structure is elevated on a stone or concrete base, with a wooden deck and steps leading up to a spacious covered porch. The porch is enclosed by black railings and features rich, warm-toned wooden flooring. The rear side of the bungalow includes double doors and additional steps, suggesting access to a backyard or garden area. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on symmetry and open, airy spaces. The use of wood, stone, and metal elements gives the bungalow a contemporary yet inviting appearance.
description: A modern bungalow with a gable roof, white columns, wooden deck, and spacious covered porch, featuring black railings and double doors at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, white columns, black railings, and wooden steps leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the roof's pitch, open porch area, and the symmetry of the supporting columns.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible steps, black railings, and the continuation of the wooden deck, mirroring the front.
description_view_3: Back view displaying double doors, extended deck, and additional steps, emphasizing access to the rear of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal front windows, large rear double doors
